meta.educational_goal: To understand the different layers of the OSI model and their functions.
expected_interactions: Click on a layer to see its description.

states.label: Idle
evidence: Click on a layer to see its description.

events.description: A layer in the OSI model is clicked to show its description.
evidence: onclick="showDescription('Physical Layer', 'The Physical Layer transmits raw bit streams over a physical medium.')"
onclick="showDescription('Data Link Layer', 'The Data Link Layer provides node-to-node data transfer and handles error correction from the Physical Layer.')"
onclick="showDescription('Network Layer', 'The Network Layer determines the path for data transmission and handles routing of packets.')"
onclick="showDescription('Transport Layer', 'The Transport Layer ensures complete data transfer and provides error recovery and flow control.')"
onclick="showDescription('Session Layer', 'The Session Layer manages sessions between applications, facilitating communication.')"
onclick="showDescription('Presentation Layer', 'The Presentation Layer translates data formats, encryption, and compression.')"
onclick="showDescription('Application Layer', 'The Application Layer provides network services directly to the user's application.')"

expected_observables: Description of the clicked layer is displayed.
evidence: onclick="showDescription('Physical Layer', 'The Physical Layer transmits raw bit streams over a physical medium.')"
<tr onclick="showDescription('Physical Layer', 'The Physical Layer transmits raw bit streams over a physical medium.')">
